news.headline: Hugh Jackman adds 12 extra shows at Radio City Music Hall due to high demand for "From New York, With Love."
news.summary: New York - Hugh Jackman has announced the addition of 12 extra shows for his "From New York, With Love" performance at Radio City Music Hall. This decision comes in response to the high demand for tickets. The added shows will provide more opportunities for fans to experience the show, with a total of now 14 performances scheduled. This extension reflects the enthusiasm surrounding the event, showcasing the immense popularity of Jackman's performance.

news.headline: TEAMFund's 6th Annual Report: 78M unique patients, 113M patient services given, Praava Health awarded Global Health Innovation Award for 7th year.
news.summary: Praava Health was recently honored with the Global Health Innovation Award, marking the seventh consecutive female founder recipient. The organization has provided patient services to an impressive 113 million individuals, with a total of 78 million unique patients benefiting from their initiatives. This accolade was announced in Toronto on October 16, 2024. The award was granted by TEAMFund, recognized for its efforts as a 501(c)(3) Public Charity and For-Profit Impact Fund dedicated to improving healthcare access and outcomes worldwide.

news.headline: Florida man gets 20-year jail term for running crypto Ponzi scam. Juan Tacuri sentenced on Tuesday for the scheme.
news.summary: On Tuesday, Juan Tacuri received a 20-year prison sentence for his involvement in a complex cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme, according to prosecutors.

news.headline: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR) to report Q3 2024 financials on Oct 31, 2024; conference call at 5:00 PM ET.
news.summary: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR) disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, after the market closes on Thursday, October 31, 2024. As a prominent owner and operator of multifamily residential and commercial properties in the New York metropolitan region, the Company's conference call scheduled for 5:00 PM (ET) on the same day will delve into the financial results and offer a comprehensive business update.

news.headline: Medicine powerhouse Christine M. Schwiebert named Pinnacle Lifetime Member for contributions to cardiothoracic surgery.
news.summary: Renowned medical professional Christine M. Schwiebert has been honored as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for her outstanding contributions to the field of Cardiothoracic Surgery. Schwiebert, a dedicated Physician Assistant (PA), is recognized for her expertise in first assisting in surgical procedures. The accolade was announced on October 16, 2024, in Dallas.

Groves, Jr., MD, DrPH, has been recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his significant contributions to the field. Based in Princeton, N.J., the acknowledgment highlights his expertise and dedication in psychiatry. The recognition was announced on October 16, 2024, through PRNewswire. Dr. Groves has made notable impacts in the mental health sector, solidifying his status as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: US enterprises are using cloud and AI to enhance CX; majority transitioned to outsourced contact centers to improve.
news.summary: In recent years, a significant transition has occurred among U.S. enterprises moving away from in-house contact centers towards outsourced alternatives to enhance customer experience (CX), according to ISG. This shift in strategy has becoming increasingly common, with a notable number of companies opting for outsourced contact centers.

news.headline: CHOP study reveals genetic links in childhood speech disorders, offering insights into diagnosis/treatment.
news.summary: New research from Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) unveiled crucial genetic connections in speech and language disorders. The findings, released on October 16, 2024, provide fresh insights that could enhance the diagnosis and treatment of these conditions. This study sheds light on the importance of genetic factors in speech-related disorders and underlines the potential for this knowledge to impact medical approaches. The study's results potentially pave the way for advancements in identifying and addressing speech and language disorders, with the research conducted by CHOP researchers proving instrumental in understanding the genetic underpinnings of these conditions.

news.headline: ExxonMobil plans to sell Bakken Shale assets in North Dakota for $500 million to focus on high growth regions post Pioneer acquisition.
news.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE: XOM), the leading oil producer in the US, is reportedly planning to sell off some assets in North Dakota's Bakken shale formation. As per a Reuters report, the company is seeking a deal that could yield a minimum of $500 million. The potential sale involves a portion of ExxonMobil's Bakken shale holdings, consisting of around 137 operated and 676 non-operated and royalty wells spread across 49,000 net acres in North Dakota. The estimated proceeds from this sale exceed $500 million, aligning with XOM's strategy to restructure its portfolio subsequent to the $60 billion Pioneer Natural Resources acquisition in May. This decision aims to consolidate ExxonMobil's assets and concentrate on areas with higher growth opportunities. Despite the divestiture plans, ExxonMobil affirms its dedication to ongoing investments in North Dakota's shale production as part of its long-range strategy. Energy data provider Rextag indicates that the company's total production... (The complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: EXL to release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 29, 2024. Ended Sept. 30, 2024. (NASDAQ: EXLS). News release, fact sheet, presentation online.
news.summary: ExlService Service Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EXLS), a prominent company specializing in data analytics and digital operations, is set to announce its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, Oct. 29, 2024. The report will cover the period ending Sept. 30, 2024, and will be made public after the market closes on that day. Interested parties can access an earnings news release, an investor fact sheet, and a presentation providing insights into the financial outcomes on the company's investor relations website.

news.summary: Established in 1907, the Siam Commercial Bank Public Company is the oldest bank in the South Pacific nation.

news.headline: Bitcoin prices surge to $68K for 4th time aiming to break 217-day downtrend, as onchain metrics hint at sustainable momentum.
news.summary: Several metrics recorded an increase in onchain activity as the price of Bitcoin surged to $68,000. This uptick suggests that the current price momentum may be able to hold steady.

news.headline: Chainalysis faces $650M defamation lawsuit, set to appear in court.
MARA Holdings stock rose with Bitcoin prices hitting three-month highs. Bitcoin ETFs received $555.8M inflows on Monday.
news.summary: Shares of MARA Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:MARA) are on the rise as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) reached its highest levels since July. The surge in Bitcoin to three-month highs has also boosted other cryptocurrencies and related stocks. Apart from MARA Holdings, other mining companies like Riot Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:RIOT) and CleanSpark, Inc. (NASDAQ:CLSK) have experienced gains. The influx of investments in Bitcoin ETFs on Monday saw a massive $555.8 million in net inflows, the highest since July. As of Wednesday, Bitcoin prices reflect their peak levels since July. Additionally, MARA Holdings recently disclosed securing a $200 million line of credit after market close on Tuesday.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs beats Q3 earnings with $8.40/share, exceeding $6.89/share consensus. Total revenues up 7.5% to $12.7 billion.
news.summary: In the third quarter, Goldman Sachs Group Inc (NYSE:GS) announced positive earnings, surpassing market expectations. The company's earnings per share stood at $8.40, exceeding the consensus of $6.89 per share. Core operating earnings were reported to be around $9.02 per share, resulting in a core ROTCE of approximately 11.7% for the quarter. Analyst Chris Kotowski from Oppenheimer reiterated an Outperform rating for the company and increased the price target to $614 from $577. The standout performers were the investment banking and equity trading segments, driving total revenues to $12.7 billion, a 7.5% increase compared to the previous year. This growth came amidst a challenging investment banking climate, showcasing Goldman Sachs' resilience and strength in the market.

news.headline: Shook, Hardy & Bacon adds Partner Jad Sheikali to expand Privacy & Cybersecurity Practice in Chicago on Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Shook's Privacy & Cybersecurity Practice, recognized by Chambers, is growing its partner team by welcoming Jad Sheikali in Chicago on October 16, 2024. The law firm, Shook, Hardy & Bacon, is strengthening its expertise in this area with more lawyers, emphasizing their commitment to this field.

news.headline: Heimar hf. approved buy-back program to purchase up to 10% of issued shares at the AGM on March 12, 2024.
news.summary: During the Annual General Meeting held on March 12, 2024, Heimar shareholders granted approval for the Board of Directors to buy back a maximum of 10% of the company's issued shares as permitted under Article 55 of the Act on Public Limited Companies No. 2/1995.

news.headline: Toll Brothers launching luxury community Manzanita Park in Morgan Hill, California at 19685 Juniper Loop in 2025.
news.summary: In Morgan Hill, California, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), known as the top luxury home builder in the U.S., revealed plans for its upcoming community named Manzanita Park on October 16, 2024. Situated at 19685 Juniper Loop, this exclusive collection of townhome-style condominiums is slated to be available for purchase in early 2025.

news.headline: 55 counterparties take $272.028 billion at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Italy plans to raise Bitcoin capital gains tax by 62%, from 26% to 42%, for all crypto assets.
news.summary: The Italian government is considering increasing the capital gains tax rate on Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies from 26% to 42%.

news.headline: Microgravity accelerates muscle loss model for sarcopenia treatment. ISS Lab enables tissue chip studies. 50M global affected.
news.summary: Research conducted at the International Space Station National Laboratory has facilitated significant studies on muscle tissue chips in microgravity. As reported on October 16, 2024, over 50 million individuals worldwide are affected by sarcopenia, an age-related disorder leading to muscle loss. This condition was highlighted by the World Health Organization.

news.headline: Crypto analyst Murad Mahmudov reveals 5 tips for identifying 'Memecoin Supercycle' winners by skipping Dogecoin, Shiba Inu for newer memes.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency analyst Murad Mahmudov recently shared his strategy for identifying potential winners in the upcoming “Memecoin Supercycle” of 2025. In his tweet, Mahmudov advises investors to target meme coins with high growth potential by focusing on those that have the capacity to become major players. He also suggests investing in coins that have experienced multiple -70% drops, indicating the possibility of significant rebounds. Mahmudov underscores the importance of examining coins with certain characteristics, such as those that have maintained a market capitalization under $10 million for an extended period. For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Study shows meme coins like Dogecoin and Shiba Inu achieved billion-dollar valuations in months, faster than traditional companies. Dogecoin hit $17 billion market cap in 8 years with 12-member team, rivaling Nutanix Inc. narrative around value creation shifting. Shiba Inu reached $10.8 billion in just a year.
news.summary: A recent study has brought attention to the rapid billion-dollar valuations attained by meme coins in comparison to traditional Nasdaq-listed companies. The study found that while it typically took established corporations 25-35 years to reach billion-dollar valuations, meme coins like Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) and Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) achieved this milestone within just months. Social Capital Markets' report emphasizes the remarkable speed at which meme coins are growing compared to their corporate counterparts. Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE), originating as a joke in 2013, obtained a $17 billion market cap in eight years with a team of around 12 members. This valuation is on par with Nutanix Inc., a cloud computing company that required 15 years and 6,000 employees to reach a similar market cap. Notable instances include Shiba Inu, which hit $10.8 billion in just one year, matching the valuation of IT company NICE Ltd.

news.headline: US Officials expect Israel’s counterattack on Iran will come before us election day - CNN.
Info-Tech Research Group releases blueprint for modernizing IAM systems with four-step strategy to enhance security.
news.summary: A recent report developed by Info-Tech Research Group presents a strategic plan supported by research for security leaders to modernize identity and access management (IAM) systems. This blueprint aims to enhance security and operational effectiveness within organizations amidst the current digital environment.

news.headline: Sherwin-Williams to pay dividend of $0.715/share on Dec 6, 2024. Shareholders of record on Nov 15.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, the Board of Directors of The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) disclosed a standard quarterly dividend of $0.715 per common share. This dividend is set to be paid on December 6, 2024, to shareholders who are recorded as such by November 15, 2024.

news.headline: Titania Solutions Group acquires Folsys Engineering to accelerate growth in Intelligence Community. Expansion of core capabilities.
news.summary: An engineering company specializing in satellite systems has helped Titania Solutions Group Inc. (Titania), a small business serving the federal government's essential missions, enhance its core capabilities. This development was announced on October 16, 2024, in McLean, Virginia. Titania is known for its significant contributions to critical government initiatives, and the collaboration with the satellite systems engineering company is expected to further strengthen its services.

news.headline: MicroStrategy stock up as Bitcoin hits $68,000, company holds 252,220 BTC reserves. Bitcoin ETFs saw $555.8M in net inflows.
news.summary: MicroStrategy Incorporated (NASDAQ:MSTR) is experiencing a surge in share price as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) crosses $68,000, its highest point since July. MicroStrategy is considered a Bitcoin proxy with 252,220 Bitcoin reserves as of Sept. 19, making its stock highly sensitive to Bitcoin price changes. Bitcoin ETFs witnessed notable growth with a $555.8 million inflow on Monday, the highest since July. Bitcoin also hit its highest levels since July. MicroStrategy is set to disclose Q3 2024 earnings on Oct. 30 post-market close.

news.headline: ORR Protection Systems acquires DSI to enhance fire protection in Texas, strengthening services with $2.5 million investment.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky on October 16, 2024, ORR Protection Systems, Inc., a leading provider of critical fire protection solutions, has acquired Detection & Suppression International (DSI) based in Houston, Texas. This acquisition is a significant move for ORR as it expands its assets and enhances its market position.

news.headline: Investor Druckenmiller hints at writing in a candidate for upcoming election.
AI search startup Tako raises $5.75M in seed funding led by Kevin Hartz and Ramtin Naimi, with notable industry participants.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Tako, an innovative AI search engine designed to visualize and disseminate global knowledge, reported today that it secured $5.75 million in a seed funding round. The funding was spearheaded by Kevin Hartz from A* and Ramtin Naimi from Abstract Ventures, alongside contributions from Stanley Druckenmiller and Kevin Warsh, Gokul Rajaram, Naval Ravikant, Stan Chudnovsky, Guillermo Rauch of Vercel, Scott Belsky from Adobe, GC Lionetti of OpenAI, George Sivulka of Hebbia, Aravind Srinivas of Perplexity, and Johnny Ho.

news.headline: IRG appoints Lichter, Goffstein, and Holley to lead strategic growth plans. Industrial Realty Group focuses on industrial redevelopment and adaptive reuse. Los Angeles, Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Lichter, Goffstein, and Holley have been appointed to lead IRG's strategic growth plans and foster new opportunities. The announcement was made by Industrial Realty Group, LLC (IRG), a prominent company in industrial redevelopment and adaptive reuse. The news was revealed in Los Angeles on October 16, 2024, via PRNewswire.

news.headline: Global chest drainage devices market expected to reach $1.3 billion by 2031 with a 5.4% CAGR, rising from $799.6 Mn in 2022. Crucial for treating lung conditions and post-surgical recovery, the market growth is driven by their role in improving respiratory function in critical care.
news.summary: The global chest drainage devices market was valued at US$ 799.6 million in 2022 and is expected to reach US$ 1.3 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 5.4% between 2023 and 2031. Chest drainage devices are crucial medical tools used to remove air, fluid, or blood from the pleural space, aiding patients with conditions like collapsed lungs, blood accumulation, and fluid buildup. Key players in the industry include companies like ATMOS MedizinTechnik GmbH & Co. KG, Becton, Dickinson and Company (BD), Cardinal Health, Inc., and Medtronic. These devices are essential in emergency rooms, intensive care units, and surgical settings to ensure proper respiratory function. The market is seeing strong growth due to the critical role these devices play in treating life-threatening conditions and post-surgical complications, making them indispensable in modern healthcare.

news.headline: Range Global LNG Ecosystem Index ETF (LNGZ) restates NAV on Oct. 15, 2024 due to disclosure issue, affecting investors.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC, the investment adviser of Range Global LNG Ecosystem Index ETF (NYSE Arca: LNGZ), revealed that the Fund's net asset value (NAV) per share on October 15, 2024 had experienced a change. The specific numbers regarding the NAV per share on that date have not been disclosed in this announcement.

news.headline: Clarion Communications acquires IPitomy Communications, expanding cloud/UC services. ATLANTA, Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Clarion Communications, LLC (Clarion) disclosed its plan to merge with a cloud-based Unified Communications (UC) and Managed Service Provider (MSP) on October 16, 2024. This partnership will strengthen their position in the market, with Clarion being a top player in the field. The collaboration will combine their resources and expertise to provide comprehensive services to their clients.

The classic muscle-car era prioritized performance, while the modern era elevated to new levels. The upcoming potential of muscle cars will be showcased by Mopar at SEMA 2024. enthusiasts and experts alike anticipate how high this new era of muscle cars can push the boundaries. Stay tuned for more updates from Mopar on this exciting development.

news.headline: TNT Sports and Unrivaled to form media partnership starting Jan 2025. 45+ games to be streamed on Max and truTV. TNT to be an equity partner in women's basketball.
news.summary: TNT Sports will serve as the primary network for the Unrivaled league, streaming all games on Max and showcasing live game telecasts on truTV. A total of over 45 regular-season games will be presented during the league's inaugural season. Additionally, TNT Sports will become an equity partner in the new women's basketball venture.

news.headline: KeyShot introduces new SaaS category, Product Design-to-Market Suite, helping companies save millions with 3D innovation.

This innovative strategy involves the launch of a complete set of tools aimed at spearheading this new category. KeyShot's Product Design-to-Market Suite is set to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: F.N.B. Corporation wins National Culture Excellence Awards and earns third consecutive Top Workplace Award in Charlotte, NC.
news.summary: First National Bank, a leading subsidiary of F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB), has secured its third consecutive Top Workplace Award in Charlotte, NC. The bank stands out for its exceptional employee experience, demonstrated by winning four Top Workplaces awards. The recognition reflects the dedication of the bank towards providing a positive work environment for its staff.

news.headline: Alaska Native Corporation Goldbelt Inc. to build a cruise port in Juneau, Alaska with Royal Caribbean Group. Plans to showcase Tlingit culture and reduce one-third of bus traffic.
news.summary: A new port development in Juneau, Alaska set to open in 2024 aims to showcase the region's vibrant Tlingit culture while also reducing nearly 30% of bus traffic from the city's busiest streets. The project by Goldbelt Incorporated seeks to improve the experience for both residents and visitors, offering a glimpse into the rich indigenous heritage of the area. This initiative is expected to significantly alleviate traffic congestion in Juneau and create a more enjoyable environment for all, marking a pivotal step towards sustainable urban development in the region.

news.headline: URSROBOT will unveil NEXMOW M2 powered by Qualcomm at Equip EXPO 2024 in Louisville, Ky., on Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Louisville in Kentucky marks the location for the upcoming introduction of the NEXMOW M2 by URSROBOT, a prominent player in AI-powered robotics. This highly-anticipated commercial landscaping solution will make its debut at Equip EXPO 2024. The NEXMOW M2, a state-of-the-art robotic mower, is set to revolutionize commercial landscaping practices with its advanced technology and capabilities.

news.headline: LOVB LOVB Cosmetics, a South Korean beauty brand, is rising in popularity with 36% sales growth during Amazon Prime Day.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on October 16, 2024, the popular South Korean beauty brand LOVB LOVB Cosmetics, operating under SSLKH Co., Ltd., is making waves in the industry with its Natural Cover Glow Cushion product. Renowned for its innovative and skin-friendly formulas, the brand has seen significant success, registering a remarkable sales growth of 36% during the recent Amazon Prime Day event.

news.headline: ASML Holding stocks drop as company cuts full-year outlook, with Q3 net sales of $8.16 billion euros, but reduces full-year guidance to 30-35 billion euros.
news.summary: Shares of ASML Holding N.V. (NASDAQ:ASML) fell further on Wednesday following a significant drop on Tuesday when the chip equipment manufacturer revised its full-year forecast. The company's stock plummeted by 16% on Tuesday due to reduced sales projections attributed to sluggish chip demand beyond AI applications. Although ASML reported third-quarter net sales of 7.5 billion euros ($8.16 billion), surpassing the projected 7.12 billion euros, it narrowed its annual sales outlook range from 30-40 billion euros to 30-35 billion euros. Despite positive trends in AI, other market sectors are facing challenges. Visit Benzinga.com for additional details.
